description: Pins the instance-interface add POST body and the interface-shape rejections now enforced in both languages (Python gained Go's exactly-one-of check). Cases set confirm:true so both reach the shape check.

cases.name: rejects an interface with no type
cases.expect_error: interface must define exactly one of public, vpc, or vlan

cases.name: rejects a vpc interface without a positive subnet_id
cases.expect_error: interface.vpc.subnet_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This adds a network interface to the Linode instance. Set confirm=true to proceed.
